caption: Lena lounges on a sun-kissed rooftop terrace, her boho maxi dress swirling in the warm breeze as golden hour hues bathe the coastal city. 🌴✨ A sultry smile and playful glint in her eye capture the essence of spring allure. #SpringVibes #BeachLife #ExoticDestinations #GlamourGirl #InfluencerStyle #TravelGoals
